$SPCX IS NOW 6TH LARGEST PUBLIC COMPANY IN THE U.S.
Elon Musk officially becomes the world’s first trillionaire after the $SPCX IPO
$SPCX JUST BROKE ABOVE $160

$LAES plans to launch its first quantum security satellite on a $SPCX mission in Q4 2026.

The satellite is aimed at securing space-based communications against future quantum-era cyber threats.
$SPCX is now indicated to open at $175 per share

Space stocks are getting hit today as investors appear to be following “sell the proxies, buy the leader” playbook on the day of $SPCX IPO: 

• $SPCE -24%
• $ASTS -11%
• $VOYG -10%
• $LUNR -10%

Elon Musk rang the Nasdaq opening bell today as SpaceX officially began trading under $SPCX.

Elon Musk on $SPCX going public in the largest IPO ever:

“It’s hard to believe this company is now going public. I gave SpaceX less than a 10% chance of succeeding and told people we would fail.”
Today is the day $GOOGL watches its $900M $SPCX investment from more than a decade ago turn into potentially north of $100B.
$ADBE just broke below $200 for the first time since 2018.

Last night nearly 20% of my Family Portfolio was added to the Nasdaq 100.

Its surreal seeing $RKLB, $NBIS and $ALAB reach this milestone after first buying Rocket Lab at $3B market cap, Nebius around $10B and Astera Labs near $8B. 

This portfolio was built around themes I believe will matter over the next decade and space plus compute are becoming two of the biggest pillars of the new economy.

Happy $SPCX IPO day. 

SpaceX at $138 per share would make Elon Musk the world’s first trillionaire.

The implied open right now is $175.

Bill Gurley says $V & $MA are “heavily threatened” by stablecoins because there is “zero reason” digital payments should still cost 2% to 3%.

USDC can move money in seconds for pennies while earning yield and stablecoins may modernize payments faster than the government can.

$NVDA has told Chinese customers its next-generation Vera AI data center CPU could launch as early as August.

Nvidia expects Vera to become a major new business targeting $20B in revenue by the end of this fiscal year.

FUTURUM EQUITIES PODCAST EPISODE #45

Daniel and I will be live today at 1PM EST exclusively on the Futurum Equities YouTube channel covering:

• What the market is missing about $ORCL earnings
• How $NBIS, $RKLB, $ALAB & $CRWV made it into Nasdaq 100
• Everything you need to know about $SPCX IPO
• $NVDA Vera Rubin, Feynman & why Nvidia’s addressable market could double with next-gen chips
• $GOOGL $35B TPU financing backstop for Anthropic & why frontier labs are trading independence for guaranteed compute access

We’ll leave the last 10 minutes for live Q&A so bring your questions!

A $1.75T IPO with only 5% float, a new Fed Chair's first meeting days later.

6⃣0⃣ Seconds $SPCX 🚀

NEWS: Founders Fund turned a $600 million bet on SpaceX into more than $50 billion.

Peter Thiel's Founders Fund was the first institutional investor in SpaceX. It put in about $600 million across several rounds over nearly 20 years.

At the $135 $SPCX IPO price, that roughly 3% stake is worth more than $50 billion, Bloomberg reports. It is one of the great venture bets of all time.

Founders Fund is not alone. Bloomberg says Valor Equity holds about 4% worth nearly $70 billion. Andreessen Horowitz sits on more than $10 billion.

Thiel saw it coming. "I would never bet against Elon in anything." Hard rule number one in Silicon Valley.
Interesting perspective
The path to a trillionaire $SPCX

Brian Costin, a fiscal watchdog with AFP Illinois and prior ties to Illinois Policy Institute, criticizes Gov. JB Pritzker for eight years of budgets always including tax hikes, citing 57 tax and fee increases since 2019 that added $77 billion in revenue.

In Bezos' own words: "Something that today was going to take 100 engineers 10 years to build, if you can change that to taking 10 engineers one year to build, you're just going to get way more things built."
WTI Crude Oil Futures (July 2026 contract, front month) are currently trading around $86.40–$86.50 per barrel.
BANG!
*MUSK BECOMES WORLD'S FIRST TRILLIONAIRE AS SPACEX JUMPS AT OPEN

With SpaceX getting priced at $135 today, Bloomberg estimates Musk's net worth is now $970.5B

Tomorrow, any pop above the IPO price (or a Tesla rally) could make him the first Trillionaire!

That's why I don't "think" - I just accept the signal and execute
CHART OF THE DAY: Commodities: In And Out  app.hedgeye.com/insights/183… via @hedgeye
FWIW I find it helpful to keep multiple narratives in your mind, not one. It promotes the flexibility to reorient when the signals point to Quad shifts.
Most people in our community live with that mindset - those who don't stand out. We try to help/coach them

@KeithMcCullough - it took me a few quarters to get used to Quad shifts. There's a natural tendency to want to understand why instead of executing. It's not easy to reprogram oneself. I woke up to Quad 1.  That just means to it's time to rebalance.
We don't just do stocks

Note: the subscriber didn't ask me about Currencies, Commodities, or Bonds. 

He's learning the #GoAnywhere Global Macro Game (which is great) but like most people trained on US financial media, he still really only cares about his stocks.

$SPAL $SNK

Before anyone insults Michael, remember that he manages multiple funds and has been in the markets for decades.

The amount of armchair criticism is hilarious. Does anyone here know what it takes to run a fund? Managing risk, investor expectations, liquidity, compliance, position sizing, and performance isn't the same as posting charts on social media.

Before mocking him, ask yourself: do you have any idea what it takes to run a fund? Most people can't even manage their own portfolio, let alone other people's money.

Its the most difficult profession in the world.
Weak people use social media to act out who they really are bc publicly they get punched in the face for being a pretentious cunt.

So many people use social media to insult, yet so little to just be nice. Meanwhile being nice makes you feel better, whereas rage rooms have been proven to be counterproductive for rage management. Mysteries of the universe...

I will always follow back people who are decent and respond to nasty posts about me to defend me.

Just because it’s social media doesn’t mean you get a pass for being an asshole.

Just because it’s social media doesn’t mean you shouldn’t be recognized for being a decent person.
Beyond me why people are legit assholes like this.

It’s also my father’s.

An immigrant from Egypt who owed $200 dollars to his sister, who worked at a gas station while learning the language facing discrimination, finding his way to markets, building multiple companies.

He accomplished more than you or Bitcoin ever will asshole
